THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS STREET,#703, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $162.82 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $162.82, STAYED UNTIL FEB-28-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
